suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine the frontend-experience-worker procedure and handoff rubric so `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` either requires concrete evidence of redesign screenshot review and failing tests before implementation, or explicitly documents a narrower exception path for copy/test-only landing-page fixes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The round-1 synthesis already flagged missing screenshot-review evidence and test-first gaps across the landing-redesign milestone. Round 2 repeated the same pattern in both fix reviews: landing-redesign-hero-live-honesty-fix again claimed full procedure adherence without transcript evidence of required library/screenshot review, while landing-redesign-direct-radiant-and-hermes-resource-fix again showed implementation edits landing before the new provenance test file and no saved screenshot-review evidence.
